---
title: "Annotated Bibliography: Rural Election Administration"
author: "Cameron Wimpy"
date: today
bibliography: ab-annotate-example.bib
nocite: '@*'
citeproc: false
filters:
  - ab-annotate.lua
ab-annotate:
  show-abstract: true
  show-annotation: true
  show-labels: true
  abstract-label: "Abstract"
  annotation-label: "Annotation"
format:
  pdf:
    documentclass: article
    geometry: margin=1in
    fontsize: 11pt
    csl: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/citation-style-language/styles/master/apa.csl
  html:
    theme: default
    css: ab-annotate.css
    csl: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/citation-style-language/styles/master/apa.csl
  typst:
    csl: apa
---

This annotated bibliography surveys key works on election administration
in rural contexts. Entries include abstracts where available and personal
annotations noting relevance to ongoing research.

::: {#refs}
:::
